pages.title: Typesetters note
pages.html:
Typesetters note

This is a LaTeX rendition of Deligne's Cohomology, Lecture Notes in Mathematics, 569, Springer-Verlag. The typesetting was done by Daniel Miller. The source code may be found at GitHub (https://www.github.com/dkmiller/sga4.5). It is an essentially unmodified version of the original. Most changes are slight, e.g. using script instead of roman letters for sheaves. The biggest is that \(\operatorname{Hom}\) is used to denote “sheaf hom,” and \(\mathsf{R}\underline{\operatorname{Hom}}\) its derived functor, while \(\mathsf{R}\operatorname{Hom}\) is used to denote the derived functor of the regular hom-functor. Any comments or corrections should be sent to dkmiller@math.cornell.edu.
